body_txt: It is a truth universally acknowledged that nerds wear glasses. They typically wear ugly, unflattering glasses that help them as they study, read, and obsess over obscure academic topics. There are several types of glasses that are signifiers of deeply-entrenched nerd-dom:  This trope frequently overlaps with Pubescent Braces . Sub-Trope of Smart People Wear Glasses . Compare to Glasses of Aging , which is when the glasses are a signifier of advanced age. Contrast with Bespectacled Cutie and Glasses Are Sexy , for cases where the glasses are used to make a character cuter or sexier, respectively. Related to Bullying the Bespectacled , with which it may overlap. You may also be interested in the other Glasses Tropes .
